## MediaAttachingEvent type

Fired when [Player.attachMedia()](/reference/cmaf-lite.player.attachmedia) is called and the media element is being attached.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type MediaAttachingEvent = {
    media: HTMLMediaElement;
};
```
